metadata.name: Convert Term to Whole Life Insurance

description: A policyholder with a convertible term life policy wants to convert it to a whole life policy.

nodes.task_description: Identify the policyholder and verify their term policy has a conversion option.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the policy is eligible for conversion.

nodes.task_description: Explain the features of the new whole life policy, including the higher premium and cash value accumulation.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly explains the differences and benefits of the new policy.

nodes.task_description: Process the conversion paperwork and provide the new policy documents and premium schedule.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully processes the policy conversion.
